headline: National Education Philosophy Review Proposed After 36 Years
context: Academics and civil society called for a review of the Falsafah Pendidikan Kebangsaan adopted in 1988.

cards.big: Falsafah Pendidikan Kebangsaan has not been revised since its adoption in 1988
cards.sub: 36-year-old philosophy predates the internet digital economy and globalization

cards.big: FPK's 5 pillars emphasize balanced development but assessment measures only academic output
cards.sub: Gap between stated philosophy and actual practice has widened over decades

cards.big: 18 education reform reports since 1988 noted misalignment between FPK and school reality
cards.sub: Repeated diagnoses without philosophical revision perpetuate the disconnect

cards.big: Japan revises its Fundamental Law of Education approximately every 20-25 years
cards.sub: Periodic philosophical renewal keeps education purpose aligned with societal change

cards.big: An education philosophy written before the internet cannot guide schools into the 2030s
Should Malaysia convene a national commission to rewrite the education philosophy for 2030
